# Endorfin — Running Events and Run Clubs in India

> Endorfin is a free Android app and web directory for discovering running events and run clubs across India. It lists 500+ marathons, half marathons, 10K runs, and 5K races, plus a verified directory of run clubs in every major Indian city — Delhi, Gurgaon, Noida, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, and more. Users can RSVP to club runs, create community runs, follow other runners, and discuss race logistics in per-event chat threads. Available free on Google Play.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.endorfin.run/) — Event discovery, app features, community overview
- [Races](https://www.endorfin.run/races) — All running events across India, filterable by city
- [Run Clubs](https://www.endorfin.run/clubs) — Verified directory of run clubs across India
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.endorfin.run/privacy) — Data handling and DPDPA 2023 compliance
- [Terms of Service](https://www.endorfin.run/terms) — Usage terms for the Endorfin platform
- [Support](https://www.endorfin.run/support) — Help and frequently asked questions

- [Run clubs in Bengaluru](https://www.endorfin.run/run-clubs/bengaluru)
- [Run clubs in Pune](https://www.endorfin.run/run-clubs/pune)
- [Run clubs in Hyderabad](https://www.endorfin.run/run-clubs/hyderabad)
- [Run clubs in Chennai](https://www.endorfin.run/run-clubs/chennai)
- [Run clubs in Kolkata](https://www.endorfin.run/run-clubs/kolkata)
- [Run clubs in Ahmedabad](https://www.endorfin.run/run-clubs/ahmedabad)

## Featured Clubs

- [Rukna Mana Hai Run Club](https://www.endorfin.run/clubs/rukna-manahai) — 11,000+ member running community in Thane (Hiranandani, Manpada, Ghodbunder Road). Weekend 5–7 km runs paired with post-run pickleball, badminton, and dance cardio. Brand partners include Reebok, KIMS Hospitals, Nitrro Sport, and Pickledeck.

## Key Facts

- 500+ running events listed across India
- 25+ cities covered (Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai, and more)
- Verified run-club directory: morning crews, marathon training squads, trail collectives
- 10,000+ runners on the platform
- Free to use, available on Google Play
- Features: event discovery, one-tap RSVP, community runs, club RSVPs, event discussions, runner profiles
- Contact: hello@endorfin.run
